name: claude-plugins
description: A collection of Claude Code plugins for workflow orchestration, parallel planning, documentation, research, and project management.

plugins.name: ask
plugins.description: Read-only codebase advisor that explores, explains, and guides without making changes. Supports Q&A, impact analysis, and comparison modes.

plugins.name: plan-workflow
plugins.description: Unified planning pipeline: feature research, shared context creation, parallel plan generation, and validation. Orchestrates parallel research and analysis agents for comprehensive implementation planning.

plugins.name: code-report
plugins.description: Generate structured implementation reports documenting changes made during plan execution. Creates reports with overview, files changed, features, and test guidance.

plugins.name: implement-plan
plugins.description: Execute parallel implementation plans by deploying implementor agents in dependency-resolved batches. Step 3 of the planning workflow, requires parallel-plan.md from plan-workflow plugin.

plugins.name: git-workflow
plugins.description: Git commit and documentation workflow manager. Analyzes changes, determines commit strategy (direct vs agents), writes conventional commit messages, coordinates documentation updates, and creates pull requests.

plugins.name: orchestrate
plugins.description: Orchestrate multiple specialized agents to accomplish complex tasks efficiently through intelligent task decomposition, parallel execution, and result synthesis.

plugins.name: deep-research
plugins.description: Conduct strategic multi-perspective research using the Asymmetric Research Squad methodology with 8 specialized personas. Deploys parallel research agents covering historical, contrarian, analogical, systems, journalistic, archaeological, futurist, and negative-space perspectives.

plugins.name: write-docs
plugins.description: Orchestrate 5 specialized documentation agents in parallel to analyze codebase and create comprehensive documentation. Includes audit, gap analysis, parallel agent deployment, and quality assurance.

plugins.name: project
plugins.description: Project workspace management: initialize Claude CLI environments with agents/MCPs based on project analysis, and orchestrate parallel cleanup agents to identify and remove unnecessary files with comprehensive safety measures.
